rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §13.1521 governs school district consolidation petitions and is unrelated to homestead exemption levels.
quote: Sec. 13.1521. RECEIPT OR CONSIDERATION OF PETITION REQUESTING DETACHMENT AND ANNEXATION AFTER ADOPTION OF CONSOLIDATION RESOLUTIONS.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject (school district consolidation petitions).
